name: Achi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Achi, a traditional Ghanaian alignment game on a 3x3 grid of 9 points. Each player has FOUR pieces (one more than Three Men's Morris / Tapatan). Place all eight pieces, leaving exactly one empty point, then slide a piece along a line into the single empty adjacent point. First to align three of their own pieces in a row, column, or diagonal wins.
